executive_summary: Global supply chains are under considerable strain, compounded by volatile energy markets and widening wealth inequality. The AI bubble index suggests a moderate risk of market correction, while fuel reserves remain critically low.
correlations: Supply Chain Stress and Fuel Reserves are linked; high stress elevates fuel consumption and intensifies distribution bottlenecks. Wealth Inequality Fracture Gap negatively correlated with Taiwan Media Panic, indicating potential for economic instability to impact geopolitical tensions in Taiwan.
